buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black hover:bg-[#F2D06B] rounded-none px-8 py-4 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest font-semibold transition-all duration-300
buttons.outline: bg-transparent border border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#D4AF37] hover:text-black rounded-none px-8 py-4 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest transition-all duration-300
buttons.ghost: text-white hover:text-[#D4AF37] transition-colors duration-300 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs

cards.service: group relative overflow-hidden bg-[#0F0F0F] border border-white/5 hover:border-[#D4AF37]/30 transition-all duration-500 p-8 md:p-12

inputs.default: bg-transparent border-b border-white/20 focus:border-[#D4AF37] rounded-none px-0 py-4 text-white placeholder:text-white/30 focus:ring-0 transition-colors duration-300

layout_strategies.hero: Full screen immersive video/image with slow zoom (Ken Burns). Text overlay bottom-left aligned. Navigation floating transparent.
layout_strategies.fleet_grid: Bento grid layout. Hero car spans 2 cols. Detail shots 1 col. Use negative space.
layout_strategies.services: Horizontal scroll or staggered list with large typography numbers (01, 02, 03).
layout_strategies.booking_widget: Sticky bottom bar on mobile, floating glass panel on desktop.

principles.reveal: Staggered fade-up for text. Images scale out (1.1 -> 1.0) on reveal.
principles.hover: Slow, elegant transitions (0.5s ease-out). No jerky movements.

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' with thin stroke width (1.5px) or 'phosphor-icons' (light weight).

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL DEPENDENCIES: npm install @fontsource/playfair-display @fontsource/manrope lenis framer-motion lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge
2. SETUP FONTS: Import fonts in index.js or App.js.
3. THEME: Force Dark Mode. Set body background to #050505.
4. NAVIGATION: Create a 'Glass' navbar that disappears on scroll down and reappears on scroll up (smart nav).
5. BOOKING: The 'Book Now' CTA must be the most prominent element, using the Primary Gold color.
6. IMAGES: Use the provided URLs. Add a subtle black overlay (bg-black/40) to ensure text readability.
7. FOOTER: Massive footer with 'MSY LIMO' in huge typography (20vw size) at the bottom.
8. SEO: Use semantic <header>, <main>, <section>, <footer> tags. H1 must be 'Luxury Chauffeur Service in Maryland & DC'.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': No generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Dark Mode Only: Do not implement a light mode toggle. Luxury is dark.
Micro-interactions: Buttons should have a magnetic effect or a subtle fill animation on hover.
Data-Testid: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
